title: 9 Herbal Tinctures For Gas In Stomach
description: Foeniculum vulgare tinctures contains compounds like fenchone and anethole. These active ingredients have a carminative effect, which means they help to release trapped gas in the stomach and intestines. The fenchone in Foeniculum vulgare tinctures has a direct action on the digestive system, relaxing the muscles and reducing spasms that can cause discomfort.
